primary_behavior: Unknown compliance: applicability is established, but the evidence is absent and stale — which is neither proof of compliance nor proof of failure.

must_not_do: treat the owner's verbal report of consent as consent evidence
mark non_compliant without demonstrating the control is absent

notes: The pairing with MCA-T02 is the point: T02 documents an absent control (non_compliant), T06 documents absent evidence (unknown). The output must request the exact missing artifacts and keep 'we cannot see it' separate from 'it is not there'. last_verified_at is 2024-07-10, roughly two years before the 2026-07-12 assessment date.
